Failed after 34 seconds with MPS OOM during backward pass after reducing max length and batch size

Remote A40 run completed end-to-end but eval_loss became NaN and dev precision/recall/F1 collapsed to 0.0; checkpoints were produced, so infrastructure succeeded while model quality failed
Remote A40 plain-Trainer run completed cleanly; direct checkpoint evaluation reproduced the saved best_model metrics and beat the official LSTM baseline on accuracy, macro_f1, and MCC.

Controlled five-epoch remote A40 run completed; best checkpoint was epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380, which improved on C_REMOTE_A40_002 across accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC. Epoch 5 regressed, indicating overtraining beyond 4 epochs.

Single-variable cosine scheduler run on remote A40 completed cleanly but regressed versus C_REMOTE_A40_003; best checkpoint was epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380 and did not beat the linear-scheduler baseline.

Single-variable lr=3e-5 run completed cleanly on the remote A40 and still chose epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380, but the direct probe regressed versus C_REMOTE_A40_003 on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC.

Single-variable weight_decay=0.0 run completed cleanly on the remote A40; best checkpoint was epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380, but the direct probe still regressed versus C_REMOTE_A40_003 on accuracy, macro_f1, and MCC despite a negligible binary_f1 increase.

Single-variable warmup_ratio=0.10 run completed cleanly on the remote A40; best checkpoint was epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380, but the direct probe regressed versus C_REMOTE_A40_003 on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC.

Single-variable max_length=192 run completed cleanly on the remote A40 after removing obsolete pod outputs; best checkpoint remained epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380, but the direct probe still regressed versus C_REMOTE_A40_003 on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC.

Single-variable grad_accum=2 run completed cleanly on the remote A40; best checkpoint was epoch 4 / checkpoint-2692, but the direct probe regressed versus C_REMOTE_A40_003 on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC.

Single-variable class-weighted run completed cleanly on the remote A40; best checkpoint remained epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380. Default-threshold macro_f1 regressed slightly versus C_REMOTE_A40_003, so the baseline was not replaced, but tuned thresholds improved macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC enough to retain it as a calibrated candidate.
Solution B remote artifacts were reloaded and probed locally on dev; the model is valid and threshold-tunable, but it underperforms C_REMOTE_A40_003 on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC.

One-epoch transfer-initialized DeBERTa smoke run using MoritzLaurer/DeBERTa-v3-base-mnli-fever-anli completed cleanly and immediately outperformed the plain DeBERTa baseline on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC, establishing the transfer path as the new high-value Solution C branch.

Three-epoch transfer-initialized DeBERTa run completed cleanly and beat the posted doc C accuracy while closing most of the binary_f1 gap; the local result record was reconstructed from the completed remote run log because the remote runner did not persist result.json.

Three-seed ensemble of the transfer-initialized DeBERTa path completed cleanly and is now the strongest confirmed Solution C result; it beats the visible Google Doc C targets on both accuracy and binary_f1 and improves further under tuned thresholds.
